name: Country — Genre Study 2018–2025
bio: Top 10 Billboard country hits per year 2018–2025. DNA analysis of what made each era's country hits. From pop-country shine to the authentic singer-songwriter raw era of Zach Bryan and Morgan Wallen.
producer_notes: See the full genre analysis in suno_music_prompts.html for year-by-year charts and universal prompts.

songs.title: Universal Country Style Prompt
songs.dna: See suno_music_prompts.html for full year-by-year analysis (2018–2025) including top 10 hits per year and complete DNA breakdown.
songs.style_prompt: Outlaw country-pop, warm acoustic guitar, pedal steel lead, punchy kick drum, gritty male baritone vocal, raw emotional energy, small-town nostalgia, dusty Southern atmosphere, intimate verse building to explosive sing-along chorus, subtle banjo accents, organic production, 95 BPM, melancholic undertone with hopeful resolution, whiskey-soaked late-night feel, modern radio-ready mix, authentic storytelling warmth
songs.lyric_prompt: Write a modern country song about a man who left his small hometown and the woman he loved behind, returning years later to find everything the same except her. Use hyper-specific Southern imagery: gravel roads, porch lights, barn gates, fireflies, jukeboxes. The tone is aching nostalgia with a bittersweet acceptance. The title and hook phrase should be a single evocative image. Structure: two intimate verses with conversational storytelling, a pre-chorus that builds tension, an anthemic singalong chorus that repeats the hook phrase, a quieter bridge with a moment of honest self-reflection, then a final chorus. Keep the language plain and direct. Under 4 minutes.
